title: Mock Test 65 - Apologizing & Thanking
description: Apologizing ও Thanking Expression নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন। I'm sorry, I apologize, Please forgive me, Thank you, Thanks a lot, I appreciate it, You're welcome, Don't mention it — সঠিক ব্যবহার।

questions.question: ক্ষমা চাওয়ার সবচেয়ে সাধারণ উপায় কী?
questions.explanation: 'I'm sorry' = সবচেয়ে common apology। 'I apologize' = more formal।

questions.question: Formal apology-এর সঠিক phrase কোনটি?
questions.explanation: 'I apologize for the inconvenience.' = formal apology।

questions.question: 'Please accept my apologies.' — এটি কী বোঝাচ্ছে?
questions.explanation: 'Please accept my apologies.' = formal apology (written/spoken)।

questions.question: কারো ক্ষমা গ্রহণের সঠিক উপায়?
questions.explanation: 'That's okay / Don't worry / It's fine' — সবগুলোই polite acceptance of apology।

questions.question: ধন্যবাদ জানানোর formal উপায়?
questions.explanation: 'Thank you very much.' = formal। 'I am grateful' = even more formal।

questions.question: ধন্যবাদ দেওয়ার উত্তরে কী বলবেন?
questions.explanation: 'You're welcome / My pleasure / Not at all' — সবগুলোই correct response।

questions.question: 'I appreciate your help.' — এটি কী বোঝায়?
questions.explanation: 'I appreciate your help.' = I am grateful for your help (formal thank you)।

questions.question: 'Don't mention it.' — কখন ব্যবহার করবেন?
questions.explanation: 'Don't mention it.' = polite reply to 'Thank you' — meaning 'it was nothing'।

questions.question: ছোটখাটো ভুলের জন্য casual apology?
questions.explanation: 'Oops, sorry.' = casual minor mistake-এর জন্য। 'My bad' = informal/young generation।

questions.question: 'I owe you an apology.' — এর অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'I owe you an apology.' = I should apologize to you (আমার ক্ষমা চাওয়া উচিত)।

questions.question: Error: 'I am sorry for late.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'I am sorry for being late / for the delay.' — 'for late' incomplete।

questions.question: Error: 'Thank you for you help.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Thank you for your help.' — 'your' possessive adjective needed।

questions.question: Error: 'Please excuse my late.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Please excuse my lateness / my being late.' — 'late' adjective, noun form needed।

questions.question: Error: 'I am very sorry for the trouble I have cause.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'I have caused' — Past Participle (caused) needed।

questions.question: Fill: 'I ___ for being late.'
questions.explanation: 'I apologize' (verb) — 'I am sorry' (adj) — 'I offer my apology' (noun)।

questions.question: Fill: '___ you very much for your kindness.'
questions.explanation: 'Thank you very much.' — 'Thank' is a verb here।

questions.question: Fill: 'I would like to ___ my sincere gratitude.'
questions.explanation: 'Express my gratitude' = formal thanks।

questions.question: Fill: 'Please ___ my sincere apologies.'
questions.explanation: 'Please accept my apologies.' — formal apology।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'বিলম্বের জন্য আমি দুঃখিত।'
options: I am sorry for the delay.
questions.explanation: 'I am sorry for the delay.' — সঠিক formal apology।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'আপনার সাহায্যের জন্য আমি কৃতজ্ঞ।'
options: I am grateful for your help.
questions.explanation: 'I am grateful for your help.' — formal and correct।
